item.title:
Asked my AI browser agent to cancel my Xfinity account.
There is no cancel button. Anywhere.
The o...
item.description:
Asked my AI browser agent to cancel my Xfinity account.
There is no cancel button. Anywhere.
The only path: open the support bot, type "I want to cancel" four times, and it schedules you a retention callback.
Not a cancellation. A callback.
How is this legal?! https://t.co/D64pL61Wni
--- @gregpr07 | ❤️ 8 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 419
item.author: @gregpr07
